name: ORIGINCLEAR, INC.
business: OriginClear, Inc. provides on-site water treatment systems and services through its subsidiary Progressive Water Treatment (PWT), and is developing a water-as-a-service model called Water on Demand (WOD) that charges on a per-gallon basis. The company also engages in joint ventures to develop and manage Bitcoin mining facilities.
sellsTo: Hotels and resorts, real estate housing developments, office buildings, military installations, schools, farms, food and beverage manufacturers, industrial warehouses, oil and gas producers, medical and pharmaceutical facilities

exposures.sentence: As deteriorating infrastructure and rising water costs drive businesses toward self-reliance, the Company provides on-site water treatment systems designed to achieve high levels of purification and recycling that centralized utilities cannot deliver.
During 2025, the company submitted a new patent for Blockchain-Validated Control System for Automated Water Treatment Operations which is pending (patent 19544387).

On September 16, 2025, the Company entered into a joint venture agreement with Block40X Inc. to form a Wyoming limited liability company (the Block40X JV ) to develop and manage Bitcoin mining facilities in the United States.

On September 26, 2025, the Company entered into a joint venture agreement with Bitmern Investments LLC, a subsidiary of Bitmern Technologies LLC, to form a Florida limited liability company (the Bitmern JV ).
